revenue_recognition.franchise_royalties: Recognized monthly as services rendered; technology fees included in franchise royalties
revenue_recognition.franchise_fees: Initial franchise fees, ADA fees, master franchise fees — deferred and recognized straight-line over term of agreement net of pre-opening performance obligations
revenue_recognition.pre_opening_services: Training and construction management recognized upon opening (practical expedient elected)
revenue_recognition.vendor_rebates: Recognized when franchisees purchase from preferred vendors and collectability is reasonably assured
revenue_recognition.corporate_owned_sales: Membership dues recognized straight-line over term; PT revenue recognized when service performed; prepaid sessions deferred until used or expired
revenue_recognition.equipment_sales: Revenue recognized upon delivery and installation
revenue_recognition.advertising_fund: Contributions recognized as revenue; expenses recognized as operating expenses; continuing engagement credits included in other revenues

securitization_debt.covenants: Debt service and securitized net cash flow coverage ratios; maintenance of reserve accounts; optional and mandatory prepayment provisions; rapid amortization events
securitization_debt.covenant_compliance: In compliance for all quarters in 2024 and 2023

otf_acquisition.accounting_treatment: Business combination between entities under common control — no step up to fair value; pushdown accounting not elected

related_party_transactions.allocation_basis: Management estimate of time and resources dedicated to Company operations

property_and_equipment.useful_lives: Furniture/equipment/auto: 5-7 years; leasehold improvements: shorter of lease term or useful life

income_taxes.treatment: Disregarded entity for tax purposes — income, losses, credits included in Purpose Brands Holdings LLC returns
income_taxes.provision: No federal/state income tax provision; state minimum fees provided

inventory.composition: Finished goods — equipment, studio supplies, retail products, technology hardware

contingencies.legal: Various claims and proceedings; management believes no material effect
contingencies.concentration_credit: Cash in excess of FDIC limits at major institutions
